scripts.dev:mvp:internal: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f infra/docker/compose.yml -f infra/docker/compose.dev.yml up --build -d postgres redis mailpit migrate relay fetchers worker api web admin nginx
scripts.dev:mvp:internal:no-build: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f infra/docker/compose.yml -f infra/docker/compose.dev.yml up -d postgres redis mailpit migrate relay fetchers worker api web admin nginx
scripts.test:criterion-compile:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T worker python -m app.smoke criterion-compile
scripts.test:cluster-match-notify:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T worker python -m app.smoke cluster-match-notify
scripts.test:embed:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T worker python -m app.smoke embed
scripts.test:ingest:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T fetchers pnpm --filter @newsportal/fetchers test:rss-smoke
scripts.test:interest-compile:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T worker python -m app.smoke interest-compile
scripts.test:normalize-dedup:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T worker python -m app.smoke normalize-dedup
scripts.test:relay:phase45:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T relay pnpm --filter @newsportal/relay test:phase45-routing
scripts.test:relay:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T relay pnpm --filter @newsportal/relay test:relay
scripts.test:relay:phase3:compose: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.yml exec -T relay pnpm --filter @newsportal/relay test:phase3-routing
